              simp only [smul_eq_mul, Prod.norm_def]
              have h1 : ‖(x, y)‖ = max ‖x‖ ‖y‖ := rfl
              nlinarith [norm_nonneg x, norm_nonneg y, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, 
                         sq_nonneg (‖x‖ - ‖y‖), min_le_left cx cy, min_le_right cx cy]
          _ ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 := by
              have h1 : min cx cy • ‖x‖^2 ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 := by
                calc min cx cy • ‖x‖^2 ≤ cx • ‖x‖^2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, min_le_left cx cy]
                  _ ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 := hx.1
              have h2 : min cx cy • ‖y‖^2 ≤ re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 := by
                calc min cx cy • ‖y‖^2 ≤ cy • ‖y‖^2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖y‖, min_le_right cx cy]
                  _ ≤ re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 := hy.1
              simp only [smul_eq_mul] at h1 h2 ⊢
              linarith
      · calc re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 
            ≤ dx • ‖x‖^2 + dy • ‖y‖^2 := by linarith [hx.2, hy.2]
          _ ≤ (2 * (dx + dy)) • ‖(x, y)‖^2 := by
              simp only [smul_eq_mul, Prod.norm_def]
              have h1 : ‖(x, y)‖ = max ‖x‖ ‖y‖ := rfl
              nlinarith [norm_nonneg x, norm_nonneg y, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖,
                         le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
constructor <;> simp only [Inner.inner, map_add, Prod.norm_def, smul_eq_mul] <;> nlinarith [(_hx x).1, (_hx x).2, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, hcx, hdx, hcy, hdy, norm_nonneg x, norm_nonneg y]

simp only [Inner.inner, map_add, Prod.norm_def]
      constructor
      · have hx := (_hx x).1
        have hy := (_hy y).1
        have h1 : (min cx cy / 2) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 ≤ (min cx cy / 2) • (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) := by
          apply smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left
          · have : (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 ≤ ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖, sq_le_sq' (by linarith [norm_nonneg x]) (le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖), sq_le_sq' (by linarith [norm_nonneg y]) (le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖)]
            exact this
          · positivity
        calc (min cx cy / 2) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 
            ≤ (min cx cy / 2) • (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) := h1
          _ = (min cx cy / 2) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + (min cx cy / 2) • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by ring
          _ ≤ cx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + cy • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, min_le_left cx cy, min_le_right cx cy]
          _ ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 := by linarith
      · have hx := (_hx x).2
        have hy := (_hy y).2
        have h1 : ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
        have h2 : ‖y‖ ^ 2 ≤ (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
        calc re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 
            ≤ dx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + dy • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by linarith
          _ ≤ dx • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 + dy • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
          _ = (dx + dy) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by ring
          _ ≤ (2 * (dx + dy)) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖)]
  conj_symm := by simp[Inner.inner, conj_symm, add_comm]
  add_left := by simp[Inner.inner, add_left]; ring
  smul_left := by simp[Inner.inner, smul_left]; ring

simp only [Inner.inner, Prod.norm_def, map_add]
      constructor
      · have hx := (_hx x).1
        have hy := (_hy y).1
        calc (min cx cy / 2) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 
            ≤ (min cx cy) • (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) / 2 := by
              simp only [smul_eq_mul]
              have h1 : (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 ≤ ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by
                have := sq_nonneg (‖x‖ - ‖y‖)
                nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, sq_abs (‖x‖ - ‖y‖), 
                          sq_max_le_add_sq_self ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
              nlinarith [min_le_left cx cy, min_le_right cx cy, sq_nonneg (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖)]
          _ ≤ (cx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + cy • ‖y‖ ^ 2) / 2 := by
              simp only [smul_eq_mul]
              have := min_le_left cx cy
              have := min_le_right cx cy
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖]
          _ ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 := by nlinarith
      · have hx := (_hx x).2
        have hy := (_hy y).2
        calc re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 
            ≤ dx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + dy • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by nlinarith
          _ ≤ (dx + dy) • (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) := by simp only [smul_eq_mul]; nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖]
          _ ≤ 2 * (dx + dy) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by
              simp only [smul_eq_mul]
              have : ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 ≤ 2 * (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by
                have h1 : ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, sq_nonneg ‖x‖]
                have h2 : ‖y‖ ^ 2 ≤ (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖]
                linarith
              nlinarith

simp only [Inner.inner, map_add, Prod.norm_def]
      have hx := _hx x
      constructor <;> nlinarith [hx.1, hx.2, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, norm_nonneg x, norm_nonneg y, le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]

simp only [Inner.inner, map_add, Prod.norm_def]
      constructor
      · have hx := (_hx x).1
        have hy := (_hy y).1
        have h1 : min cx cy / 2 • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 ≤ min cx cy / 2 • (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) := by
          apply smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left
          · have : (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 ≤ ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
            exact this
          · positivity
        calc min cx cy / 2 • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 
            ≤ min cx cy / 2 • (‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2) := h1
          _ = min cx cy / 2 • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + min cx cy / 2 • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by ring
          _ ≤ cx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + cy • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, min_le_left cx cy, min_le_right cx cy]
          _ ≤ re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 := by linarith
      · have hx := (_hx x).2
        have hy := (_hy y).2
        have h1 : ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
        have h2 : ‖y‖ ^ 2 ≤ (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]
        calc re ⟪x, x⟫_𝕜 + re ⟪y, y⟫_𝕜 
            ≤ dx • ‖x‖ ^ 2 + dy • ‖y‖ ^ 2 := by linarith
          _ ≤ dx • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 + dy • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
          _ = (dx + dy) • (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖) ^ 2 := by ring

sq_nonneg (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖), min_le_left cx cy, min_le_right cx cy,
      le_max_left dx dy, le_max_right dx dy]

simp only [Prod.norm_def, map_add]
      constructor <;> nlinarith [(_hx x).1, (_hx x).2, (_hy y).1, (_hy y).2, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]

simp only [Inner.inner, map_add, Prod.norm_def]
      have ⟨cx',dx',hcx',hdx',hx'⟩ := inner_top_equiv_norm (𝕜:=𝕜) (E:=X)
      have ⟨cy',dy',hcy',hdy',hy'⟩ := inner_top_equiv_norm (𝕜:=𝕜) (E:=Y)
      constructor <;> nlinarith [(hx' x).1, (hx' x).2, (hy' y).1, (hy' y).2, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, sq_nonneg (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖), le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖]

constructor <;> simp only [Inner.inner, map_add, Prod.norm_def, smul_eq_mul] <;> nlinarith [(_hx x).1, (_hx x).2, sq_nonneg ‖x‖, sq_nonneg ‖y‖, sq_nonneg (max ‖x‖ ‖y‖), le_max_left ‖x‖ ‖y‖, le_max_right ‖x‖ ‖y‖, hcx, hdx, hcy, hdy]
